description: Stylish to the hilt, this classic handbag from puma tops our wishlist this season! Pick one up and stay trendy!Height: 25 cmWidth: 36 cmDepth: 7 cmNylon and PU upper Two short handlesOne main zippered compartment with two pouches and a zippered compartmentPocket on front with velcro fastened flap and plastic branding Fabric liningCareClean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wringDo not iron
